findings.message: Required sub-component 'table-header' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
findings.rationale: The table's own constraints demand semantic structure: header cells as th within a TableHeader so screen readers can associate columns, and records inside a TableBody. A table without both is a grid of divs wearing table styling.

findings.message: Required sub-component 'table-caption' (min 1) not found among descendants (found 0).
findings.rationale: The data-table-with-row-actions pattern requires an accessible name via TableCaption or an aria-label. The pattern permits either; the contract can only govern the declarative form, so the caption is the enforceable floor — an aria-label alternative is legitimate but inexpressible in current rule types and remains guidance.
